subcodes.first_line: We make mention of all who are present and absent, and of those who have ascended unto God, the All-Compelling, the Self-Subsisting. I bear witness that My servant Al-Báqir [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انا نذکر کل من حضر و غاب و من صعد الی الله المهیمن القیوم اشهد ان عبدی الباقر
